Back PoolGuyPro

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 28, 2026

PoolGuyPro ("we," "our," or "us") operates the usapoolmarket.com platform. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our app.

1. Information We Collect

When you create an account or use PoolGuyPro, we may collect:

  • Name, email address, and profile photo
  • Phone number (optional, for contact purposes)
  • Geographic region (city/county in Florida)
  • Professional information (ratings, job history, listings)
  • Messages sent through the in-app chat
  • Device information and usage data for app performance

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To create and manage your account
  • To connect pool professionals with clients and each other
  • To send notifications about jobs, messages, and marketplace activity
  • To process subscription payments via Stripe
  • To improve the app and prevent fraud or abuse

3. Information Sharing

We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with:

  • Other users: your name, photo, region, and professional rating are visible to other app users as part of the marketplace
  • Stripe: payment information is processed directly by Stripe — we never store your card details
  • Supabase: our database and authentication provider
  • Law enforcement: if required by law or to protect the safety of users

4. Data Retention

We retain your account data as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your account and associated data by contacting us at the email below. Deleted accounts are permanently removed within 30 days.

5. Security

We use industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS), secure authentication via Supabase, and access controls to protect your data. No system is 100% secure — please use a strong, unique password.

6. Push Notifications

With your permission, we send push notifications for new jobs, messages, and marketplace activity. You can disable notifications at any time in your device settings.

7. Children's Privacy

PoolGuyPro is intended for adults (18+) working in the pool service industry. We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under 18.

8. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. To exercise these rights, contact us at the email below.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via the app or email. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

Questions about this Privacy Policy? Contact us at felipelwo@gmail.com
